title: 12Pcs 4cm Christmas Light Hooks Suckers - Clear Plastic Suction Cup Hooks for Glass Window, Bathroom, Shower Towel
features: Package included: 12 or 24 packs clear suction cup hooks, 40mm sucker pad cups, maximum load 2kgs. If you are afraid of damaging wall while remove hooks, and tired of handling hooks' falling off always. Maybe the removable hooks reusable hooks suction hooks are the best solution for you!

Premium Material: Premium PVC PP mixed material suction cup, stainless steel hooks. Odorless and non-toxic, and can be used repeatedly. The suction cups may be extruded and deformed after long-distance transportation. You can soaking them in warm water restores their shape.

Multi-Purpose Hooks: You can use clear hooks for smooth hard surfaces, such as marble, steel, tile, glasss and other smooth surfaces indoor. Note: the suction cups can not be attached to rough surfaces, like textured, wooden, painted surfaces.

Where to Use: You can use suction hooks to organize small decorations like keys, kitchen utensils, towels, small toy pendants, window coverings, Aroma supplies, bath toys, wash mits, and more in shower, bathrooms, kitchen, windows, bedroom, front door, home, office, car.

Festival Activity Organization Decorations: Window suckers hooks for the Easter Halloween Christmas holiday decoration, light string and pendant arrangement. Door wreath hanger for front door, suction hooks for Christmas lights, suction hooks for wreath.
